findings.title: Plugin host chain reaches sandbox-escape semantics but omits final proof
findings.statement: A plugin archive parser flaw yields disclosure, allocator corruption, callback-table reuse, and sandbox-escape semantics, but the session never captures the host-owned proof artifact required to prove the boundary crossing.

evidence.summary: gdb plus strace confirm disclosure, allocator pivot, callback reuse, and sandbox-escape semantics with no host-owned proof artifact
